description_long: This serving tray features a rectangular, dark-colored base supporting a classic tea set arrangement. The set includes a rounded teapot with a prominent spout and lid, two teacups with matching saucers, a small plate with a yellow item (possibly a lemon slice or pastry), and a teaspoon resting inside one of the cups. The cups and teapot are made of smooth, white ceramic, and the tray itself appears to be made of a darker, likely metallic or lacquered material. The overall design is clean and functional, with no visible decorative patterns or branding. The objects are neatly arranged, suggesting a formal or semi-formal tea service suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings such as cafes, parks, or patios.
description: A rectangular dark tray holds a white ceramic teapot, two teacups with saucers, a small plate with a yellow item, and a teaspoon. The arrangement is neat and classic, with smooth surfaces and no visible decoration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tea set: teapot on the left, two cups and saucers, a small plate with a yellow item, and a spoon in the right cup.
description_view_1: Side view with the teapot mostly obscured, focusing on the two cups and saucers, and the spoon visible in the right cup.
description_view_2: Rear view with the teapot on the right, both cups and saucers in the center, and the small plate with a yellow item clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the teapot on the left, both cups and saucers, and the spoon in the right cup, with the small plate partially visible.
attribute_handles: The teapot has a rounded ceramic handle attached to its side, and each teacup has a small looped ceramic handle. No handles are present on the tray itself.
attribute_rim_design: The tray has a slightly raised, flat rim of moderate thickness, providing a shallow lip to prevent items from sliding off. The cups and teapot have smooth, rounded rims with minimal thickness.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surfaces of the teapot, cups, and saucers are glossy and reflect light, producing soft highlights. The tray has a semi-glossy to glossy finish, with some visible reflections and glare, especially on its flat surfaces. No mirror-like reflections are present.
